mapper.sql: delivery_dept_no, dept_No, rorder_no, rorder_item, rorder_fno, model_no, quantity, status, intercept, customer_no, user_no, end_user, corder_no, stock_type, stock_code, prod_flag, ready_qty, exp_qty, returned_qty, invoice_qty, order_type, ROrdDate, dlv_date, wms_dlv_date, cdlv_date, dlv_entire, ready_time, ship_time, spec_mark, exp_dlv_type, remark, trade_companyId, DlvType, PurchaseNO, cproduct_no, DlvSite, group_customer_no, ppl_no, project_no, shikomi_no, sales_info_no, expected_delivery_time, estimated_delivery_day, has_low_price, purchase_unit_code, ext_order_no, ext_order_item, allot_start_time, allot_end_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.rcv_view
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.rcv_view (delivery_dept_no, dept_No, rorder_no, rorder_item, rorder_fno, model_no, quantity, status, intercept, customer_no, user_no, end_user, corder_no, stock_type, purchase_unit_code, ext_order_no, ext_order_item, allot_start_time, allot_end_time) values (#{deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, insert into dbo.rcv_view
delivery_dept_no,
dept_No,
rorder_no,
rorder_item,

mapper.update:
update dbo.rcv_view
delivery_dept_no = #{record.deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_No = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_item = #{record.rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rorder_fno = #{record.rorderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
intercept = #{record.intercept,jdbcType=BIT},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
corder_no = #{record.corderNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
stock_type = #{record.stockType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stock_code = #{record.stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prod_flag = #{record.prodFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
ready_qty = #{record.readyQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
exp_qty = #{record.expQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
returned_qty = #{record.returnedQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
invoice_qty = #{record.invoiceQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
ROrdDate = #{record.rorddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dlv_date = #{record.dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
wms_dlv_date = #{record.wmsDlvDate,jdbcType=DATE},
cdlv_date = #{record.cdlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
dlv_entire = #{record.dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR},
ready_time = #{record.readyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ship_time = #{record.shipTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
spec_mark = #{record.specMark,jdbcType=CHAR},
exp_dlv_type = #{record.expDlvType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
trade_companyId = #{record.tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvType = #{record.dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
PurchaseNO = #{record.purchaseno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
cproduct_no = #{record.cproductNo,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
DlvSite = #{record.dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR},
group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl_no = #{record.pplNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_no = #{record.projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shikomi_no = #{record.shikomiNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expected_delivery_time = #{record.expectedDeliveryTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
estimated_delivery_day = #{record.estimatedDeliveryDay,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
has_low_price = #{record.hasLowPrice,jdbcType=INTEGER},
purchase_unit_code = #{record.purchaseUnitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ext_order_no = #{record.extOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ext_order_item = #{record.extOrderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
allot_start_time = #{record.allotStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
allot_end_time = #{record.allotEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.rcv_view set delivery_dept_no = #{record.deliveryDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_No = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rorder_item =
